title: Strobilanthes autapomorpha

It is native to the Himalayas and is known to grow in the mountainous regions of the Indian subcontinent. The classification of Strobilanthes autapomorpha places it within the order Lamiales, which includes a wide range of flowering plants. The scientific classification of this species is further broken down into its kingdom, phylum, class, and order, ultimately placing it within the kingdom Plantae.
